description: Domains of life: comparison of small-subunit rRNA sequences resolves cellular life into three domains - Bacteria, Archaea and Eukarya - each with characteristic example lineages, with eukaryotes arising from within the archaeal radiation.

sources.title: Towards a natural system of organisms: proposal for the domains Archaea, Bacteria, and Eucarya
sources.authors: Woese, C. R.; Kandler, O.; Wheelis, M. L.

sources.title: Phylogenetic structure of the prokaryotic domain: the primary kingdoms
sources.authors: Woese, C. R.; Fox, G. E.

sources.title: A new view of the tree of life

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.
